message:
refactor(abi): introduce AbiRuntimePhase enum and activate membrane from wrapped main

Add AbiRuntimePhase enum (BootstrapPassthrough/Active) and
bootstrap_passthrough_active() helper to replace scattered
!is_runtime_ready() checks across membrane_state, string_abi,
and unistd_abi modules. This centralizes the bootstrap-vs-active
decision into runtime_policy with a single semantic abstraction.

Restructure __libc_start_main to defer signal_runtime_ready() until
host libc invokes the wrapped main function via host_delegate_main_wrapper,
ensuring the membrane is not activated during loader-sensitive init
but is fully active before user code begins. The wrapper stores the
original main pointer in HOST_DELEGATED_MAIN and interposes a thin
trampoline that calls init_program_name + signal_runtime_ready before
forwarding to the real entrypoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
